Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}How the Shadows entered this world is still a mystery.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I used to be a researcher for Kirijo Electronics...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}That is the primary reason why I'm the chairman of the board at your school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}And that is also what makes this dormitory such a convenient location to conduct SEES activities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14223 0 0}Oh, you should also know that I can't summon a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}However, in order to perform my research, I arduously trained to enter the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}So if you need any help, please don't hesitate to ask. Not that there's much I can do there, ahahaha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14202 0 0}You did very well for your first night in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, what'd you think of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14211 0 0}I understand. It's difficult to avoid the fatigue one experiences during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Having to fight Shadows while you explore only makes it even more exhausting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}But with enough time, I have no doubt you will be able to adapt to its rigors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}That tends to be a natural first impression when entering such a mysterious tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14229 0 0}Why, that's absolutely remarkable! Would you like to apply to become the next chairman?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}At any rate, we're going to need your help in order to investigate that tower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}How are your explorations of Tartarus proceeding?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14229 0 0}Excellent. Then, continue the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}Well, don't trouble yourself over it. Just aim to continuously hone your skills.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14224 0 0}Oh, make sure you keep a steady pace and don't push yourself too hard. Take your time and proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14222 0 0}Do you have any idea what a chairman does?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm so busy, I don't have much time for my research.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's why I'm going to dedicate this entire weekend to analyzing data.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}From morning till night, I'll be toiling away like a robot... "Rust" in peace! Hahaha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}What a difficult mission! I can't believe what happened to you all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Luckily, no one was hurt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, it would seem last night's incident with the monorail has been publicized.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}A "brake failure," they're calling it. Quite a serious malfunction, wouldn't you say? Ahaha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14222 0 0}Oh, that's right. Midterms begin tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah, those were the days, back when I used to pull all-nighter cram sessions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}After all, you've gotta study night-to-five! Get it? Haha...ha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14227 0 0}Well, I sure am glad that you agreed to take over caring for the plants.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest, just climbing the stairs up to the rooftop is rough for an old man like me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14202 0 0}I'm a little disappointed about Yamagishi-kun as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's quite difficult to find someone who has the potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wouldn't you feel more confident in your abilities with more team members?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14211 0 0}Thankfully, Sanada-kun has rejoined the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14213 0 0}But, if any of you fall ill, the team's strength will be sorely impacted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Depending on so few members puts us in a very precarious position.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14229 0 0}Hmmm... It seems Takeba-kun has a sixth sense when it comes to Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Actually, that's quite common.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Dealing with Shadows has a tendency to enhance other... senses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're getting a lot of inquiries from parents and reporters alike...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14223 0 0}Kirijo-kun and Sanada-kun left to walk Yamagishi-kun home. It's late, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Still, today was a great day for us all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've gained new power and learned more about Shadows... We're entering the next phase of our battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can't just sit on our hands, either. I'd say we could use a new trick up our sleeves...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14222 0 0}Yamagishi-kun is surprisingly skilled with technology. And she's very kind, always considering others' feelings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Her name suits her perfectly. "Fuu" means wind, and "ka" means flower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Like a flower, gently blowing in the—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ahem, getting off track there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14221 0 0}The real question is: do Shadows act independently? Or, are they working together towards some goal?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}In essence, does a group of Shadows target a single human and ravage his mind with purpose...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Or is each individual Shadow simply devouring human minds for their own survival?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is what we must discern.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14205 0 0}The mood around here has been so serious lately, I thought I would lighten things up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, today I will be performing my top twenty puns for everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}If I'm not mistaken, the next Shadow will reveal itself soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have a full moon coming up on the 7th. I expect the Dark Hour that night to be eventful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}This next operation will be crucial to my research.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Make sure you're prepared for the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}Tomorrow, my hypothesis will be put to the test...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}A Shadow will appear during the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is all quite exciting for a researcher such as myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14231 0 0}I'm so sorry about everything. Let me know if there's anything I can say to be of help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}If there's anything you want to know more about, don't hesitate to ask.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Special Shadows that appear on full moons. They are the product of a research accident ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}In the incident, an experimental entity comprised of numerous Shadows was split once more into twelve large pieces.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}As such, their power far exceeds those found in Tartarus. Tread with appropriate caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}In the end, over fifty people were injured in that accident...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}The media placed full blame on the Kirijo Group for the tragedy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}They singled out one researcher in particular, declaring him the main culprit behind it all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether it was actually all his fault or not was not the issue...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}The public was looking for someone to vent their pain and anger on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}So they chose him, even though he was a victim himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Their wrath was unparalleled. It was almost more frightening than seeing a horde of Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Under the pretense of assisting for the benefit of the Group, she was subjected to experiments on her Persona for many years.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Solving the mystery behind the unknown ability of Personas, the development of various equipment beginning with the Evoker...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}None of this would've been possible without her cooperation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}There must've been some dangerous experiments at times, too... And yet she kept agreeing to it all, I'm told.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}He and Kirijo-kun have known each other for a very long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sanada-kun joined us when he was only in middle school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}At the time, we had a third member as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}Well, that is all regarding Yakushima.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now, you will all need to concentrate on your final exams...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14223 0 0}Maybe I'll visit Mayoido myself when I have a bit of spare time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}There's a thing or two I'd like to ask...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}But above all, I'd love to take the time to browse the antiques and learn the grand history behind each piece...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14203 0 0}Hm? Is there something you'd like to know about Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I assume you are referring to the other anti-Shadow weapons...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}Well, there were quite a few created. You could say they were Aigis's siblings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, they were all destroyed ten years ago, in the incident.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Aigis has been quite lonely since then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}A Persona is a product of the human psyche.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, the plan had been to place a human mind inside an anti-Shadow weapon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}The only real issue was the form that weapon would take.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we had used a tank, for instance, the weapon's mind would recognize itself as such...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}And a contradiction would arise, as we all know a tank is not a living entity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}A human mind trying to reconcile its existence in this way would break down before you could blink.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}So, how do we prevent that contradiction? You see where I'm going with this, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}When given a body that more closely resembles the expectation of the mind, the spirit stabilizes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}That is why Aigis and her siblings were built in the form of human beings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps it's a bug in her facial recognition programming...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure it's nothing to concern yourself with. You're not worrying overmuch, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14223 0 0}I've heard there's a dog that can use a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}I'd been researching the possibility for quite some time, but it's hard to believe it could really be true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, can you imagine? A dog using a Persona? A dog! I'm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm, you could be a formidable op-pun-ent...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14224 0 0}Well, I'm sure it's nothing to be concerned about. This could even prove beneficial.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you worry too much while you're young, your hair will fall out sooner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14224 0 0}That reminds me, I heard that dog used to live with the priest at Naganaki Shrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}So he stood his ground to protect the place important to him... Mm, that's a tearjerker...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}Do you need sum-mer-time to get used to the operations?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}Good luck on the next one as well. I'll be rooting for you from the shadows, ahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Good luck on the next one as well. I'll be rooting for you from the shadows, ahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}Dogs can be very reliable, you know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why, there are rescue dogs, seeing eye dogs, narcotic detection dogs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's put our trust in Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14203 0 0}I don't want to hear that your grades are slipping because you're spending too much time in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's nothing I can do to help with that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, study hard and do your best in summer school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14212 0 0}Koromaru isn't just any old dog. He's a key member of SEES.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please be mindful of what you're feeding him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, you think that I don't know anything about fashion because I'm a researcher, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14215 0 0}Well, I'll have you know that I am as fashionable as anyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, my profession keeps me cooped up all the time, so I don't have many opportunities to dress up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}Good. You know that it's not prudent to judge a person based on preconceptions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}I have my own style too, you know. For example, I'll coordinate which shirt I'm wearing with the color of my jacket...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}You have to fashion-nate people, after all! You know, like fascinate, but with, erm... No...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14229 0 0}I'm very impressed with Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}He is quite brave for his age.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I used to be a real scaredy cat when I was in elementary school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'd run crying if a bee even came near me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}I'm confident in tomorrow's operation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}What, with Aragaki-kun rejoining us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have no doubt it'll be an easy victory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4148 0 0}Thank you, Mr. Chairman, but remember, overconfidence can only lead to defeat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}While it's true that Aragaki's quite powerful, he hasn't fought in quite a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's all concentrate on the task at hand. We must execute this flawlessly to win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14238 0 0}*sigh* Must you always be such a killjoy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}I wasn't too surprised to learn that she's Strega's support member.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Capturing her will provide us with quite an advantage...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're growing ever closer to completing our mission.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}That means only three remain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}We're so close to the end. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was going to inquire earlier, but I thought you might be "sick" of everyone asking if you're sick...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14211 0 0}Well, that's understandable. Everyone gets worried when you're not feeling well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I bet you were also thinking, "I didn't 'achoo-se' to catch a cold!" Get it? No...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14215 0 0}There's no need to be modest. I mean, it's hard to enjoy anything at all when you're not feeling well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I bet you were also thinking, "I didn't 'achoo-se' to catch a cold!" Get it? No...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}I'm very confident about our next operation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have no doubt we'll be victorious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14202 0 0}I believe Kirijo-kun told you all about the tragedy that befell Amada-kun's family...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}It happened after defeating the irregular Shadow, after the dawn of the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Amada-kun probably didn't have any idea what was happening at the time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Amada-kun and Aragaki-kun... I knew what was going on between them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14231 0 0}But I never expected it to turn into such a horrible tragedy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}We shall pray for Aragaki-kun's happiness in the next world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14206 0 0}Considering what you've all been through...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}You did an excellent job on your exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}You should all go out and enjoy the weekend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14201 0 0}Well, your exams are over now, so we should focus on the task at hand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only one Shadow remains. This will be the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}The fate of this town rests in your hands.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I believe in you. Good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14210 0 0}The team's morale seems to be high.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yes, yes, that's very good. I will be looking forward to celebrating our victory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14223 0 0}Well, what would everyone like for their last meal?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't I order a delivery of buffalo WINgs? Or some "victory-yaki"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14231 0 0}Well, I guess they're too focused to enjoy my jokes...[n]{f 1 1}
